name: feverfew
summary: Mechanism context: parthenolide-mediated NF-κB inhibition, serotonin/platelet modulation, TRPA1 and prostaglandin-pathway effects. Safety: Avoid in pregnancy; possible mouth ulcers/GI upset; allergy risk in Asteraceae-sensitive users; caution with anticoagulants/antiplatelets.. Interactions tracked: May increase bleeding risk with anticoagulants/antiplatelets/NSAIDs, caution with migraine medications..

safetyNotes: Avoid in pregnancy; possible mouth ulcers/GI upset; allergy risk in Asteraceae-sensitive users; caution with anticoagulants/antiplatelets.
interactions: May increase bleeding risk with anticoagulants/antiplatelets/NSAIDs
preparation: Leaf capsules/extracts standardized to parthenolide; fresh leaf chewing increases mouth irritation risk.
